nasb.text: Now in the place where He was crucified there was a garden, and in the garden a new tomb in which no one had yet been laid.

esv.text: Now in the place where he was crucified there was a garden, and in the garden a new tomb in which no one had yet been laid.

cnv.text: 在耶穌釘十字架的地方，有一個園子，園裡有一個新的墓穴，是從來沒有葬過人的。

ccb.text: 在耶稣被钉十字架的地方有一个园子，里边有一座新坟墓，从来没有安葬过人。

csbs.text: 耶稣被钉十字架的地方有一个园子，园子里有一座新墓穴，从来没有安放过人。
